reviews.review_description: there is no way anyone can navigat this and find it enjoyabe. $5 gamble and lost.

My kids cannot stop asking for "space goggles"... The spaceship of the imagination is finally here. First came Carl Sagan's book Cosmos & Eames' Powers of 10 documentary, then the Magic School Bus childrens book series, Cosmic Zoom IMAX film & Neil deGrasse Tyson's Cosmos TV series... To experience the majesty of our universe, of life & consciousness itself in full interactive 3D with real star maps & data-driven visualizations of the universe & human body is truly next level. Absolutely awe struck... what better way to learn & explore the universe's most profound mysteries. Powers of 10 is wondrous & unforgettable.
